series_metadata.series_description: These correspondence include Self-insured letters, Self-insured employee Evaluation Board letters and memorandums of legal opinions, Self-insured complaint responses for executive signatures.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain for 6 years after last payment of medical or 10 years after payment of compensation, retain addditional 2 years, then destroy. ; Paper: Send to the location of the Self-insure file in the SI section, Retain for 6 years after last payment of medical or 10 years after payment of compensation, retain addditional 2 years, then destroy., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
